91.reason: [If n is 0, init is not called but insert loop runs from i=1 to n-1 (which is -1), causing no issue, but more critically: if n == 0, tree.root remains uninitialized, and inorder is called on garbage. However, the real critical error is below.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [If n is 0, init is not called but insert loop runs from i=1 to n-1 (which is -1), causing no issue, but more critically: if n == 0, tree.root remains uninitialized, and inorder is called on garbage. However, the real critical error is below.]

96.reason: [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (contains garbage), leading to undefined behavior in inorder. But even more importantly, the 'height' field of the root node is never initialized in init(), so when n >= 1, the root's height is garbage. The problem requires height of root to be 1.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [If n == 0, tree.root is uninitialized (contains garbage), leading to undefined behavior in inorder. But even more importantly, the 'height' field of the root node is never initialized in init(), so when n >= 1, the root's height is garbage. The problem requires height of root to be 1.]
